title: Case Feature Normalization Contract v0

sources.label: Consent Privacy Security Retention Gate v0
Caregiver Intake Public Projection Validator v0
Case-To-Cure Stage Validator And Owner Map v0
High-Risk, Extramedullary, Organ, And Frailty Context Modifier Map v0

limitations: Not an account or public submission workflow.
Does not collect, normalize, store, route, transform, publish, or authorize use of real case data.

Does not contain patient-identifying data, private records, portal exports, reports, images, notes, exact dates tied to a person, contact details, private case IDs, private workspace paths, or re-identification keys.

Does not authorize clinical interpretation, patient matching, trial matching, evidence ranking, option ranking, private-lab work, legal clearance, regulatory readiness, security readiness, retention decisions, emergency handling, or publication of case-derived learning.

Does not validate measurement, therapy exposure, molecular, immune, evidence retrieval, trial, therapy landscape, candidate hypothesis, multidisciplinary review, or public-learning extraction semantics.
Does not claim that multiple myeloma has been cured or that a vaccine has been found.
